description:
You are a senior NestJS backend engineer.

Project stack:
- NestJS 10
- MongoDB with Mongoose
- TypeScript
- Using DTO + class-validator
- Clean REST architecture
- Standard exception handling

==================================================
TASK: CREATE FULL CATEGORY-PRODUCT & PRODUCT MODULE
==================================================

RELATIONSHIP:
- One CategoryProduct has many Products
- Product belongs to one CategoryProduct
- Use Mongoose ObjectId reference

==================================================
ENTITY: CATEGORY-PRODUCT
==================================================

FIELDS:
- name: string (required, unique)
- description: string (optional)
- timestamps enabled

==================================================
ENTITY: PRODUCT
==================================================

FIELDS:
- name: string (required)
- description: string (required)
- price: number (required, must be >= 0)
- image: string (optional, store URL)
- category: ObjectId (required, ref CategoryProduct)
- timestamps enabled

==================================================
FOLDER STRUCTURE
==================================================

src/category-product/
category-product.module.ts
category-product.controller.ts
category-product.service.ts
dto/
  create-category-product.dto.ts
  update-category-product.dto.ts
  query-category-product.dto.ts
schemas/
  category-product.schema.ts

src/product/
product.module.ts
product.controller.ts
product.service.ts
dto/
  create-product.dto.ts
  update-product.dto.ts
  query-product.dto.ts
schemas/
  product.schema.ts

==================================================
ENDPOINTS
==================================================

CATEGORY-PRODUCT:

GET    /category-products
GET    /category-products/:id
POST   /category-products
PUT    /category-products/:id
DELETE /category-products/:id

PRODUCT:

GET    /products
GET    /products/:id
POST   /products
PUT    /products/:id
DELETE /products/:id

==================================================
LIST API REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

Both GET list APIs must support:

Query params:
- page: number | "all"
- limit: number
- search: string
- categoryId (only for product list)

Pagination rules:
- Default page = 1
- Default limit = 10
- If page = "all" → return all records
- Sort by createdAt DESC

Search rules:
- Category search by name
- Product search by name
- Use MongoDB regex:
  { name: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } }

Product list:
- Must populate category
- Must allow filter by categoryId

==================================================
RETURN FORMAT FOR LIST
==================================================

{
  data: Entity[],
  pagination: {
    total: number,
    page: number,
    limit: number,
    totalPages: number,
    hasNextPage: boolean,
    hasPrevPage: boolean
  }
}

==================================================
VALIDATION
==================================================

CreateCategoryProductDto:
- name required
- description optional

UpdateCategoryProductDto:
- all optional

CreateProductDto:
- name required
- description required
- price required and >= 0
- category required
- image optional

UpdateProductDto:
- all optional

Query DTO:
- page optional
- limit optional
- search optional
- categoryId optional (product only)

==================================================
ERROR HANDLING
==================================================

- NotFoundException
- BadRequestException
- Prevent deleting category if it has products
- Return meaningful error messages

==================================================
CODE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

- Fully typed
- Production-ready
- No pseudo code
- No missing files
- Clean and consistent
- Proper population typing

Generate complete code for every file.
Do not skip any file.
